title: Cull Particles MultiLoader
description: MultiLoader particle culling mod to improve performance
body:
# Cull Particles MultiLoader
Particle culling for multiple mod loaders.

Increases your FPS by not rendering unseen particles. This mod is an updated version of [Tfarcenim's mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cull-particles-fabric) but with support for multiple mod loaders (Forge, NeoForge, Fabric and Quilt) and newer minecraft versions (1.21.x).
